response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken audio and song vocals phonetically matched the provided reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Extensively utilized the reference JSON for Orpheus lyrics, while performing manual transcription for the Japanese and English banter before and after the song. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each block to match the exact start of spoken words, using rapid transitions during the fast-paced rap sections to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for letting me sing your Shoji Meguro song together with you!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for letting me sing your Shoji Meguro song together with you!

subtitles.original: We both love Shoji Meguro!
subtitles.english: We both love Shoji Meguro!

subtitles.original: We both have a Shoji Meguro original song!
subtitles.english: We both have a Shoji Meguro original song!

subtitles.original: Yes, we both do!
subtitles.english: Yes, we both do!

subtitles.original: I was like, my first time performing it got to be with you!
subtitles.english: I was like, my first time performing it got to be with you!

subtitles.original: Yeah, no, seriously, it was so fun. It's always fun singing with a friend, so thank you for letting me be a part of it.
subtitles.english: Yeah, no, seriously, it was so fun. It's always fun singing with a friend, so thank you for letting me be a part of it.

subtitles.original: We got to harmonize, too!
subtitles.english: We got to harmonize, too!

subtitles.original: I did my best to learn the harmonies and, you know, try and remember and stay consistent.
subtitles.english: I did my best to learn the harmonies and, you know, try and remember and stay consistent.

subtitles.original: You did amazing! You impressed me!
subtitles.english: You did amazing! You impressed me!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much. Well, I guess we gotta talk about your birthstone, because now we're gonna talk about your birthday, even though it's my birthday.
subtitles.english: Thank you so much. Well, I guess we gotta talk about your birthstone, because now we're gonna talk about your birthday, even though it's my birthday.

subtitles.original: Do you know your birthstone's a topaz?
subtitles.english: Do you know your birthstone's a topaz?

subtitles.original: Yes! It's so pretty. My birthday is November 21st. I'm a Scorpio and...
subtitles.english: Yes! It's so pretty. My birthday is November 21st. I'm a Scorpio and...

subtitles.original: ...it's so pretty! It matches my...
subtitles.english: ...it's so pretty! It matches my...

subtitles.original: ...my hair, my hair...
subtitles.english: ...my hair, my hair...

subtitles.original: ...your little hair clip? So true.
subtitles.english: ...your little hair clip? So true.

subtitles.original: My gosh, it just positively lights you up. You're glowing.
subtitles.english: My gosh, it just positively lights you up. You're glowing.

subtitles.original: How about we take some pictures in front of the stone?
subtitles.english: How about we take some pictures in front of the stone?

subtitles.original: Yeah, let's do it.
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's do it.

subtitles.original: Let's do it! Alright, here we go.
subtitles.english: Let's do it! Alright, here we go.

subtitles.original: Peace? These?
subtitles.english: Peace? These?

subtitles.original: These?
subtitles.english: These?

subtitles.original: どっちでも! Either one's good.
subtitles.english: Either way! Either one's good.

subtitles.original: Oh, facing each other?
subtitles.english: Oh, facing each other?

subtitles.original: Feel a little sexy.
subtitles.english: Feel a little sexy.

subtitles.original: Oh, boy.
subtitles.english: Oh, boy.

subtitles.original: いい感じ, いい感じ! Very nice. / いい感じ! Use the hashtag!
subtitles.english: Great, great! Very nice. / Great! Use the hashtag!

subtitles.original: Yes, please. Oh my gosh, please use the hashtag lots and post lots of pictures, okay?
subtitles.english: Yes, please. Oh my gosh, please use the hashtag lots and post lots of pictures, okay?

subtitles.original: Actually, just so you know, Nerissa, Genta on the drums is the one who played for our original song, Overwrite!
subtitles.english: Actually, just so you know, Nerissa, Genta on the drums is the one who played for our original song, Overwrite!

subtitles.original: Oh my gosh!
subtitles.english: Oh my gosh!

subtitles.original: Thank you! ありがとう! Genta, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! Genta, thank you!

subtitles.original: So awesome, really appreciate you, thank you. So many wonderful band members and guests. I feel very lucky and privileged.
subtitles.english: So awesome, really appreciate you, thank you. So many wonderful band members and guests. I feel very lucky and privileged.

subtitles.original: And lucky to have you here. / Thank you, Nerissa.
subtitles.english: And lucky to have you here. / Thank you, Nerissa.

subtitles.original: Do you want to drink a water before we start? / That's a great idea, let's do that.
subtitles.english: Do you want to drink a water before we start? / That's a great idea, let's do that.

subtitles.original: Yeah. / Immediately.
subtitles.english: Yeah. / Immediately.

subtitles.original: Yes. お水 and...
subtitles.english: Yes. Water and...

subtitles.original: Okay, yeah, I think we're ready for another song then, how about that?
subtitles.english: Okay, yeah, I think we're ready for another song then, how about that?

subtitles.original: I am, too, let's do it.
subtitles.english: I am, too, let's do it.

subtitles.original: Okay! Together, we can do anything.
subtitles.english: Okay! Together, we can do anything.

subtitles.original: Next up is Calliope original song, please enjoy...
subtitles.english: Next up is Calliope original song, please enjoy...

subtitles.original: ...Orpheus!
subtitles.english: ...Orpheus!

subtitles.original: Alright! Thank you so much, Nerissa, for coming to hang out!
subtitles.english: Alright! Thank you so much, Nerissa, for coming to hang out!

subtitles.original: Let's finish this off with a bang! Here we go!
subtitles.english: Let's finish this off with a bang! Here we go!

subtitles.original: I ain't trying to stress you, I must confess though / My heart's beating to your song
subtitles.english: I ain't trying to stress you, I must confess though / My heart's beating to your song

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, thinking hurry up Orpheus, time's a wasting
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, thinking hurry up Orpheus, time's a wasting

subtitles.original: Show me what you really wanna do!
subtitles.english: Show me what you really wanna do!

subtitles.original: Another late night, aimless dreaming / The day to day starts to call
subtitles.english: Another late night, aimless dreaming / The day to day starts to call

subtitles.original: Still got like a million deadlines, still bleeding red wine / My back up against the wall
subtitles.english: Still got like a million deadlines, still bleeding red wine / My back up against the wall

subtitles.original: I got my headphones on, walk home is long / Dragging feet like I'm born to lose
subtitles.english: I got my headphones on, walk home is long / Dragging feet like I'm born to lose

subtitles.original: 'Til somehow they're tapping along to you-know-who's song / A melody I can't refuse
subtitles.english: 'Til somehow they're tapping along to you-know-who's song / A melody I can't refuse

subtitles.original: I'm outta line, but it's fine, you don't know my name / Safe inside my own mind, I don't feel the shame, okay?
subtitles.english: I'm outta line, but it's fine, you don't know my name / Safe inside my own mind, I don't feel the shame, okay?

subtitles.original: I know I get a little carried away / But we got music when there aren't any words to say!
subtitles.english: I know I get a little carried away / But we got music when there aren't any words to say!

subtitles.english: Sometimes it feels like you're playing that guitar for me and only me
